title: Manage active operational emergency disease or pest sites
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage active operational emergency disease or pest sites demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.
